---
name: Propose a new indicator
about: Suggest an organizational signal not yet in the NEI framework
title: "[New indicator] "
labels: new-indicator
assignees: ''
---

## What organizational practice does this indicator describe?

<!-- Describe what an organization has, does, or makes available. Indicators describe
     organizational infrastructure — not employee experience or survey responses. -->

## Why does it matter specifically for neurodivergent employees?

<!-- What is the ND rationale? What specific cognitive, sensory, or executive function
     challenges does this practice address? Be concrete. -->

## Proposed title

<!-- Noun phrase, standards-style. Example: "Expense processes minimize documentation burden" -->

## Proposed normalized name

<!-- Lowercase, no punctuation, spaces between words. This is used to generate the indicator ID.
     Example: "expense processes minimize documentation burden" -->

## Evidence categories

Which of the following could plausibly be assessed for this indicator?

- [ ] **Inferred** — observable from public sources (Glassdoor, job postings, public policies, news)
- [ ] **Declared** — the organization has publicly stated this practice exists
- [ ] **Validated** — an accredited third party could verify this

## Draft inferred criteria (if applicable)

<!-- What would a researcher look for in public sources? Be specific — name source types
     (e.g. Glassdoor reviews, job descriptions, employee handbook excerpts). -->

## Supporting citations

<!-- At least one peer-reviewed or credible source supporting the relevance of this indicator.
     Format: Author(s). (Year). Title. Journal/Publisher. URL -->

-

## Dissenting citations (if any)

<!-- Any credible evidence that complicates or argues against this indicator. We aim to
     represent the evidence honestly. -->

-

## Open questions

<!-- Anything unresolved that you want community input on before writing a full proposal. -->

---

*Before submitting a pull request, copy `proposals/NDP-template.md` and complete a full proposal file.*
